blended.narrative: Fernie Alpine Resort is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 5,181 ft. Looking ahead, 41 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 46°F.

Thursday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 7" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 14" of heavy snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 4" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 43°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
